testcase.name: unsupportedRepositoryUrlReportsNoTransporter()

error.message: Can't find any field or property with name 'repository'. Error when introspecting properties was : - No getter for property 'repository' in org.eclipse.aether.transfer.NoTransporterException Error when introspecting fields was : - Unable to obtain the value of the field <'repository'> from <org.eclipse.aether.transfer.NoTransporterException: Unsupported transport protocol unknown>
